ResourceName.name: Name
ResourceName.description: A unique name to identify this resource.  The name is only unique to resources of the same type.

ResourceOwner.name: Owner
ResourceOwner.description: Owning application file of this resource.

AppModules.name: App Modules
AppModules.description: View and manage modules used by this application.  Modules are the building blocks of IsoRealms; they provide the engine with functionality that allows it to do useful things.

AppFileStructure.name: App File Structure
AppFileStructure.description: View and manage the file structure of this application.  IsoRealms Applications can be spread across multiple files in order to facilitate reusable functionality.

OnInitialisation.name: On Initialisation
OnInitialisation.description: Action to perform when the application is loaded.

OnReset.name: On Reset
OnReset.description: Action to perform when the application is reset.

OnStart.name: On Start
OnStart.description: Action to perform when the application is started.

OnQuit.name: On Quit
OnQuit.description: Action to perform when the application is quit.

InputHandler.name: Input Handler
InputHandler.description: The specified input handler will handle input for this application.

Display.name: Display
Display.description: The specified display will be shown by this application.

DefaultEditor.name: Default Editor
DefaultEditor.description: The specified default editor will be loaded when editing this application.  Note that this property has no impact on the runtime of the application.

File.name: File
File.description: A file in which to data is stored for this application.

Description.name: Description
Description.description: Here you can describe the purpose of this file.

AllowModifications.name: Allow Modifications
AllowModifications.description: Specifies whether modifications are allowed to this file.  If modifications are not allowed, then resources owned by this file cannot be edited without being overridden (copied to the main application file)

Inclusion.name: Inclusion
Inclusion.description: Another file that's included within this one.

LaunchConfigurations.name: Test Launch Configurations
LaunchConfigurations.description: Create and manage different launch configurations for testing this application.

LaunchConfiguration.name: Launch Configuration
LaunchConfiguration.description: A launch configuration for testing this application.

LaunchConfigurationAdd.name: Launch Configuration
LaunchConfigurationAdd.description: Add a launch configuration for testing this application.

LaunchConfigurationOwner.name: Owner
LaunchConfigurationOwner.description: The project file that owns this launch configuration.

LaunchConfigurationOption.name: Option
LaunchConfigurationOption.description: Option with which this test configuration will launch.

LaunchConfigurationOptionAdd.name: Option
LaunchConfigurationOptionAdd.description: Add an option with which this test configuration will launch.
